hotel.name: Hotel Forza Osaka Namba
hotel.place: Hotel Forza Osaka Namba, Namba, Osaka, Japan

days.note: ⚡ CHANGED: Arrival from Kyoto (Nara/Uji moved to Kyoto May 18)

activities.name: Arrive in Osaka
activities.notes: ⚡ CHANGED: Direct from Kyoto after Kinkakuji/Ryoanji morning. JR Special Rapid Kyoto → Osaka (~30 min). Drop bags at Hotel Forza Osaka Namba.
activities.place: Hotel Forza Osaka Namba, Namba, Osaka, Japan

activities.name: 🍴 Kuromon Ichiba Market
activities.notes: ⚡ MOVED from May 20 (was Wednesday — some stalls closed). Tuesday = all stalls open. Osaka's 'kitchen' — 180 stalls of fresh seafood, wagyu, street snacks. 10-min walk from hotel.

activities.name: Osaka Aquarium Kaiyukan
activities.notes: ⚡ MOVED from May 21. After 4 PM = least crowded + 'Sea at Night' mode starts at 5 PM (lighting & sound shift). Takes ~90-120 min. Book advance e-ticket online to skip queue.

activities.name: 🍴 Dotonbori
activities.notes: Takoyaki, okonomiyaki, kushikatsu, ramen. Walk the iconic canal-side strip under the Glico Running Man sign.

activities.name: Osaka Castle
activities.notes: One of Japan's most famous landmarks. Museum inside the tower, great views from top. Walk the moat and gardens.

activities.name: 🍴 Lunch near Osaka Castle
activities.notes: ⚡ CHANGED: Kuromon moved to May 19. Grab lunch near the castle — plenty of options in Osaka Business Park or head back toward Namba.

activities.name: Shinsaibashi & Amerika-Mura + Nintendo OSAKA
activities.notes: Shinsaibashi-suji covered shopping arcade and Amerika-Mura for vintage/streetwear. Nintendo OSAKA is inside Daimaru Shinsaibashi — the only Nintendo store in western Japan. JP-exclusive merch, in-store experiences, items not sold anywhere else in the region.

activities.name: Den Den Town / Nipponbashi
activities.notes: Osaka's Akihabara — 10-min walk south from Shinsaibashi. Main stop: Animate Nipponbashi (multi-floor anime/manga merch). Also Amenity Dream (serious TCG singles shop, Osaka's competitive player community), Hobby Station (TCG-focused, loyal local playerbase). Like Akihabara: the real finds are one block off the main drag — look for staircase signs on building facades, no English, owner-operated card and hobby shops.
activities.place: Den Den Town, Nipponbashi, Osaka, Japan

activities.name: Abeno Harukas 300
activities.notes: Tallest building in Japan (300m). Observation deck with panoramic views — great for pre-sunset views. 10-min walk to Shinsekai after. ¥1,500 at gate or book online.

activities.name: Tsutenkaku Tower & Shinsekai
activities.notes: Retro tower in the old-school Shinsekai neighbourhood. Neon lights come alive at night — linger and soak it in. Great kushikatsu joints all around.

activities.name: 🍴 Kushikatsu Daruma
activities.notes: Osaka's most famous kushikatsu chain. Breaded & deep-fried skewers — no double-dipping rule!

activities.name: Universal Studios Japan
activities.notes: ⚡ CHANGED: Full day (was 10:00-13:00). Tickets already booked. Super Nintendo World + Donkey Kong Country + Harry Potter + more. Download the USJ app before arriving for Area Timed Entry to Super Nintendo World. Arrive at opening for shortest queues.

activities.name: 🍴 Namba Parks / Hozenji Yokocho
activities.notes: End the night at Hozenji Yokocho — mossy lantern-lit alley with traditional Osaka dining.

activities.name: Relaxed morning & checkout
activities.notes: Late checkout from Hotel Forza Osaka Namba. Grab breakfast, pack up. No rush — Himeji is this afternoon.

activities.name: Shinkansen: Osaka → Himeji
activities.notes: JR Special Rapid or Shinkansen from Shin-Osaka to Himeji (~30 min). Arrive ~13:00.

activities.name: Himeji Castle
activities.notes: Japan's finest original castle — UNESCO listed, National Treasure. Afternoon is less crowded as day-trippers leave by 15:30. Last entry 16:00, closes 17:00. Walk the bailey, moat and gardens.

activities.name: Shinkansen: Himeji → Hiroshima
activities.notes: Shinkansen Nozomi or Hikari from Himeji to Hiroshima (~50 min). Arrive Hiroshima ~17:30.
